params.name: Julian Calendar
params.source: CIV Master Scrolls (10.2%), Fragment Crafting (5.5%), Grandmaster Scrolls (2.1%), Lottery Machine (0.24%), Master Scrolls (1.9%), Wishing (0.2%)
params.description:
On Jan 13, 45 BC, this reliable calendar had been used for more than ten days.

Julian Calendar was put into use by Julius Caesar, the Roman dictator. In the Julian calendar, a year is divided into 12 months, alternating between long and short months. There is one leap year every 4 years, and 365 days in a year, with one extra day added to February in the leap year. This calendar has an error of one day every 128 years when compared with the tropical year. More than a thousand years later, Pope  …
